name: Eriko Aizawa
description: She is the wife of [Shuichi Aizawa](https://anilist.co/character/3767/Shuuichi-Aizawa) and mother of [Yumi Aizawa](https://anilist.co/character/84527) and a baby son. She and her children are usually sad because Aizawa is overworked and unable to spend time with them.
